ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: TENOS needs camera access to scan QR codes for device pairing and clinic verification.
ios.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow TENOS to use Face ID to unlock your protected data.
ios.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: TENOS can read selected health data, including measurements and approved medications, from Apple Health and import it into your encrypted patient record.
ios.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: TENOS does not write health data to Apple Health. This permission description is included because TENOS uses HealthKit to import approved health data.
ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TENOS needs microphone access when you use features that record audio.
